name: sqlite3-tools
title: sqlite3-tools
description:
Command line interface for SQLite 3 (tools)
This package contains various tools such as:
- showdb
- showjournal
- showstat4
- showwal
- sqldiff
- sqlite3_analyzer

commands.name: showwal
commands.description: --help: file too small to be a WAL - only 0 bytes

commands.name: sqlite3_analyzer
commands.description: SQLite3 database space usage analyzis tool

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use showdb because Command line interface for SQLite 3 (tools).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use showdb as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair showdb with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `showdb --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
